name: Shura | Former God of Fate
description:
Shura is the former god of fate, having renounced his godhood to bring his people to a new world to protect them from a traitorous member of the pantheon. In the new world, he works to secure happiness and freedom for all with his experience of a foot in both the door of the gods and that of humanity.

An important NPC in my D&D campaign who misses his spouse.
creator: tropicalapin
